MineralSite.name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the 3Q project in Argentina dated October, 2021.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the 3Q project in Argentina dated October, 2021.pdf
document.description: This NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Tres Quebradas (3Q) Project in Catamarca Province, Argentina, is a comprehensive feasibility study addressing geological, technical, engineering, operational, and commercial aspects of extracting lithium from salar deposits and brine lakes.
